heading: Definition
label: 1757 Definition
text: For purposes of this subchapter, the term “Delegate” means the Resident Representative referred to in .section 1751 of this title
notes: References in TextThis subchapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this subtitle”, meaning subtitle B (§§ 711–718) of title VII of , , , which enacted this subchapter and amended sections 4342, 6954 and 9432 of Title 10, Armed Forces. For complete classification of subtitle B to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 110–229122 Stat. 868May 8, 2008
